label: juggle_stageA_bounce

ball_y_pos.verdict: 4 consecutive hard vertical bounces, NO decay, every contact qualifies

edge_crosswind_a.verdict: FAILURE MODE: one perfect 5.43 m/s strike then loses the ball to crosswind

champion_comparison: policy_v230 bounce chain decays 4.18/4.05/1.79/0.50/negative; this sustains without decay
note: Stage A = bounce mastery, gates/windows ignored by design. 4 of 6 training cases reach 3-4 sustained bounces. Blocker is now lateral pursuit (lost ball), not push/dribble.
